entries.zh-Hans:
---
name: gif

entries.en-US: # Using Animated images in Remotion
entries.zh-Hans: # 在 Remotion 中使用动画图像

entries.en-US: ## Basic usage
entries.zh-Hans: ## 基本用法

entries.en-US: Use `<AnimatedImage>` to display a GIF, APNG, AVIF or WebP image synchronized with Remotion's timeline:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `<AnimatedImage>` 来显示与 Remotion 时间线同步的 GIF、APNG、AVIF 或 WebP 图像：

entries.en-US: Remote URLs are also supported (must have CORS enabled):
entries.zh-Hans: 也支持远程 URL（必须启用 CORS）：

entries.en-US:
```tsx
<AnimatedImage src="https://example.com/animation.gif" width={500} height={500} />
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```tsx
<AnimatedImage src="https://example.com/animation.gif" width={500} height={500} />
```

entries.en-US: ## Sizing and fit
entries.zh-Hans: ## 尺寸与适配

entries.en-US: Control how the image fills its container with the `fit` prop:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `fit` 属性控制图像如何填充其容器：

entries.en-US: ## Playback speed
entries.zh-Hans: ## 播放速度

entries.en-US: Use `playbackRate` to control the animation speed:
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `playbackRate` 控制动画速度：

entries.en-US: ## Looping behavior
entries.zh-Hans: ## 循环行为

entries.en-US: Control what happens when the animation finishes:
entries.zh-Hans: 控制动画结束时的行为：

entries.en-US: ## Styling
entries.zh-Hans: ## 样式

entries.en-US: Use the `style` prop for additional CSS (use `width` and `height` props for sizing):
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `style` 属性添加额外的 CSS（使用 `width` 和 `height` 属性控制尺寸）：

entries.en-US: ## Getting GIF duration
entries.zh-Hans: ## 获取 GIF 时长

entries.en-US: Use `getGifDurationInSeconds()` from `@remotion/gif` to get the duration of a GIF.
entries.zh-Hans: 使用 `@remotion/gif` 中的 `getGifDurationInSeconds()` 来获取 GIF 的时长。

entries.en-US:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses pnpm
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses pnpm
```

entries.en-US: This is useful for setting the composition duration to match the GIF:
entries.zh-Hans: 这对于将合成时长设置为与 GIF 匹配非常有用：

entries.en-US: ## Alternative
entries.zh-Hans: ## 替代方案

entries.en-US: If `<AnimatedImage>` does not work (only supported in Chrome and Firefox), you can use `<Gif>` from `@remotion/gif` instead.
entries.zh-Hans: 如果 `<AnimatedImage>` 不工作（仅 Chrome 和 Firefox 支持），你可以改用 `@remotion/gif` 中的 `<Gif>`。

entries.en-US:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses pnpm
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```bash
npx remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses npm
bunx remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses bun
yarn remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses yarn
pnpm exec remotion add @remotion/gif # If project uses pnpm
```

entries.en-US: The `<Gif>` component has the same props as `<AnimatedImage>` but only supports GIF files.
entries.zh-Hans: `<Gif>` 组件具有与 `<AnimatedImage>` 相同的属性，但仅支持 GIF 文件。
